caption:
Most Google Business Profiles we see around the Sault are missing the easy stuff. Not the hard technical work. The free fields the owner never filled in.

4 fixes in this one. All free, all doable this week.

Swipe through. The category field is doing more work than people think.

When did you last open your Google profile? Let us know below.
first_comment: Free Google Business Profile visibility check for Northern Ontario businesses: glvmarketing.ca
